description: Console-owned campaign profiles. Jenkins schedules them, the console defines execution/evidence conventions.

profiles.title: Quick Smoke
profiles.purpose: Local operator smoke before deeper verification.

profiles.title: CI Preflight
profiles.purpose: Jenkins preflight batch for build acceptance.

profiles.purpose: Nightly repeated regression run with stable interval.

profiles.purpose: Long-run stability evidence profile. Scheduler belongs to Jenkins.

profiles.purpose: Run the 6 representative native functional assets as a reviewer-facing OEM warning portfolio.

profiles.purpose: Run the mandatory network/gateway core verification pack.
